# Render diagnosis cell with background color based on actionability tier (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Render diagnosis cell with background color based on actionability tier
(Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_diagnosis(data, tier_colors)
```

## Arguments

- data:

  The main data frame (passed via closure)

- tier_colors:

  Named list with `t1` and `t2` hex colors for tiers 1 and 2
